text:
name: liveaszan_local

services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: liveaszan
      POSTGRES_USER: liveaszan
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD:-liveaszan_dev}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U liveaszan"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10

  server:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/server/Dockerfile.local
    ports:
      - "3001:3001"
    volumes:
      - ./server/src:/app/server/src
      - ./server/prisma:/app/server/prisma
      - ./packages/shared/src:/app/packages/shared/src
      - ./data:/app/data
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://liveaszan:${DB_PASSWORD:-liveaszan_dev}@postgres:5432/liveaszan
      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-local_dev_secret_not_for_production}
      ADMIN_EMAIL: ${ADMIN_EMAIL:-admin@liveaszan.local}
      ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${ADMIN_PASSWORD:-admin1234}
      ALADHAN_API_BASE: https://api.aladhan.com/v1
      PORT: 3001
      NODE_ENV: development
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy

volumes:
  postgres_data:
